examples: Starvation brings biochemical changes in the body.
Eurosilva should support joint European research on tree diseases and their physiological and biochemical aspects.
Researchers have established that when people are mentally engaged, biochemical changes occur in the brain that allow it to act more effectively in cognitive areas such as attention and memory.
Dr Eberhard believes there are at least three types of biochemical manipulation taking place.
That letter was opened at the city government's mail facility, in a biochemical containment box.
